name: stickerdex
description: Self-hosted, open-source digital sticker album and tournament companion for the Panini-style FIFA World Cup 2026 collection.
author: Christian Abele

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend
scripts.desktop:start: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm --prefix desktop run start
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm --prefix desktop run build
scripts.dist:win: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm --prefix desktop run dist
